titleStmt.title: SII 40.262: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 262. (A.R. No. B. 307 of 1933.) MńĀdala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up before the SakalńďŇõvara temple.
This is dated Ňöaka 1072, UttarńĀyaŠĻáa SaŠĻÖkrńĀnti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god SakalńďŇõvaradńďva by GoŠłćisńĀni(GuŠłćisńĀŠĻái), a sani of the temple at MńĀmaŠĻĀŠłćala, who was the daughter of PŇćti-NńĀyaka of PrńĀmbaŠĻüu. The gift was entrusted to MńĀredana, son of MńĀŠłćibŇćya for supply of ghee to the temple.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

ŠĻüiti pŇćtinńĀyaku kŇęŠĻĀtuŠĻüu mńĀmamŠłćala go(gu)
ŠłćisńĀni nimityamu tama tallidaŠĻĀŠłćrulaku dharmma
mugńĀ Ňõrńę sakalńďŇõvaradńďvarakunakhaŠĻĀŠłćavatti
dńępaŠĻĀbunakiccina goŠĻüiyalu 55 vńę
niŠĻĀjńďkoni mńĀŠłćiboyuni koŠłćku mńĀreda
